evidence.text: like product managers and designers, producing value for the business and customer quickly through creativity, experimentation, and good systematic thinking and technical expertise. It’s a team with a clear vision for the future and clear goals and responsibilities, with the ability to adjust the vision and the details as new information is learned. It’s a team of people willing to jump in and do whatever roles or tasks are needed regardless of official responsibilities. And it’s an organization that consciously builds psychological safety and values a range of experiences and backgrounds. Scott Baldwin, Director of Engineering, Airb
